school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Exactly one of these is true: Dunn goes with Period 3; Ellis goes with Workshop; Frost goes with Annex.
Pavilion goes with either 86% or 91%.
If 81% does not go with Period 5, then Period 3 goes with Cloister.
Frost's grade is at least 7% more than the Geography class' grade.
Either Art goes with Ellis or Period 1 goes with Bungalow.
Nash goes with neither Chemistry nor Cloister.
The class in the Annex's grade is between the class in Period 5's grade and Nash's grade.
Period 1, Period 2, and Period 5 go with French, Geography, and Bungalow, in some order.
Period 2 goes with at least one of Ames, English, or Geography.
Period 2 goes with exactly two of Dunn, Art, Workshop, and 86%.
The class in the Annex's grade is lower than both Nash's grade and the class in Period 2's grade.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Exactly one of these is true: Boris goes with 3rd; Garry goes with Zwischenzug; Mikhail goes with Fork.
Zugzwang goes with either 2185 or 2285.
If 2085 does not go with 1st, then 3rd goes with Skewer.
